_comment: Synthetic meeting recaps + transcript excerpts + action items for 45621-B design reviews. action_items carry their own ids, owners (people ids), due dates, status.

meetings.title: 45621-B Weekly Design Review
meetings.recap: Latest design review (11-JUN). The review concluded that the part design is NOT the cause of the material hardness non-conformance; root cause is a non-conforming bar-stock material lot (Apex Alloys 24-118, low hardness). The review DECIDED to: quarantine lot 24-118, remachine the two failing units with conforming material, and re-run the hardness acceptance test before qualification sign-off. Qualification completion re-baselined to 03-JUL. Quality sign-off remains held by Raj Patel until the hardness re-test passes.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Elena Cho: '...so the data says hardness is out on 24-118, not a design margin problem. I don't want to rework the process.' Raj Patel: 'Agreed, but I'm not signing qualification until we re-run the hardness acceptance test on remachined units.' Dana Whitfield: 'Then qualification completion is 03-JUL. Priya, when are conforming material here?' Priya Nair: 'Five business days, so by 13-JUN.' Dana Whitfield: 'OK. Elena owns the recovery plan, Raj owns sign-off.'

action_items.text: Quarantine Apex Alloys material lot 24-118 and request conforming replacement lot with material cert
Remachine the two failing machined units with conforming material and re-run hardness acceptance test
Issue written risk summary to Aeronix program office
Update milestone tracker with re-baselined qualification date 03-JUL

meetings.title: 45621-B Weekly Design Review
meetings.recap: Prior design review (04-JUN). The qualification test result showing hardness non-conformance on 2 of 5 units was presented. The review did not yet have root cause; assigned Priya to investigate bar-stock material lot and Raj to hold sign-off. No re-baseline decided yet at this point.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Raj Patel: 'Two of five units measured below the hardness minimum. I need root cause before I sign.' Priya Nair: 'Let me pull the material lot certs and check hardness.' Elena Cho: 'Could be material. Don't touch the design yet.'

action_items.text: Investigate Inconel 718 bar-stock material lot variation as candidate root cause
Hold qualification sign-off pending root cause

meetings.title: Aeronix Customer Sync (45621-B)
meetings.recap: Monthly customer sync with Aeronix. Customer raised concern about qualification timeline and flight-test window. Contoso committed to provide weekly status and early warning on any slip. (Restricted: customer-facing commitments.)
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Karen Vance: 'We cannot lose the flight-test window. Tell us early if you slip.' Marcus Reed: 'You'll get weekly status and a call the moment risk materialises.'

action_items.text: Provide weekly written status to Aeronix program office
